description: Armed wing of the Cabrera Sarabia brothers' La Mayiza faction of the Sinaloa Cartel, created in 2020 by Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada to counter the Jalisco New Generation Cartel. Operates in multiple Mexican states, engaging in drug trafficking, homicide, arms trafficking, and other crimes. After Zambada's arrest in 2024, leadership passed to his son Ismael Zambada Sicairos. The group is known for using paramilitary tactics and heavy weaponry.
